long_description: COS Sysdig metrics were missing and not reporting in US region.
short_description: COS platform sysdig metrics were missing in US region.
close_notes: Team upgraded the image to the latest image present in ICR
customer_facing_impact: Users are not able to get monitoring events of COS events
customers_impacted: All users in affected regions, no customer cases reported
chronology:
This is a retro CIE.

This happened due to cluster maintenance in US cluster, team ignored the alerts thinking its due to maintenance. Later when they checked the cluster it was using old image which was not present in ICR.
